name: Enchilada Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion, then drain.
2. Add spices and sauces to the browned meat mixture.
3. Mix until hot.
4. Tear the corn tortillas into strips (stale tortillas work fine).
5. In a casserole dish, layer the tortilla strips, enchilada sauce, tomato sauce, and cheese two or three times, finishing with a layer of cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for about half an hour.
